name: ameco-spot-planner-ops
description: Scripts de operación (backup y restauración de RTDB) para AMECO Spot Planner. No es el frontend, que sigue siendo index.html estático.

scripts.test:rules: node scripts/test-rules-workers.mjs && node scripts/test-rules-catalogs.mjs && node scripts/test-rules-errorlogs.mjs
scripts.test:rules:emulator: firebase emulators:exec --project demo-ameco-spot-planificacion --only database --non-interactive "node scripts/test-rules-workers.mjs && node scripts/test-rules-catalogs.mjs && node scripts/test-rules-errorlogs.mjs"
